title: What does the Colossal Flower do in Slay the Spire 2?
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
What does the Colossal Flower do? In Slay the Spire 2, you'll come across several events that ask you to make a choice that can have a big impact on the rest of your run. Usually these events have two options: a safer choice with a smaller reward, or a better reward with a more dangerous path.

The Colossal Flower is just one of these events in Slay the Spire 2, but will you choose to take the money and run, or reach deeper into the center of the flower for a more coveted prize? Unlike the Byrdonis Egg which has to be carried to a rest site, or the Lantern Key which requires you to carry it to the next act, this event provides an immediate buff, if you're willing to make the sacrifice.

Read the rest of the story...
